name: Database Reactivation Workflow (1)
description:
Build an automated Database Reactivation Workflow in Python that:
1. Identifies dormant customers from Google Sheets data
2. Generates personalized AI-driven messages via Claude API based on customer history and churn scores
3. Sends reactivation offers via email (Resend/Gmail API)
4. Logs all actions to a SYSTEM_LOG Google Sheet
5. Runs on a daily schedule
6. Has both a demo mode (sample data, console output) and production mode (real sheets, real emails)

Target clients: gyms, dental clinics, coaching businesses, and similar SMBs with 4000+ inactive leads.

Tech stack: Python, Google Sheets API, Anthropic Claude API, Resend/Gmail API, schedule library, GitHub Codespaces.

Before building, research:
1. Similar Python-based customer reactivation workflows — patterns, libraries, architectures
2. Best practices for AI-generated personalized reactivation emails — conversion vs spam, especially for gyms, dental clinics, coaching
3. Churn scoring thresholds — are 0.7/0.8/0.9 cutoffs industry standard or should they be adjusted
4. Email deliverability best practices in Python — Resend vs Gmail API vs SMTP for transactional reactivation emails
5. Any existing open-source reactivation workflow projects for reference

After research, ask 20-30 clarifying questions covering demo mode appearance, client delivery method, email language, business type handling, AI JSON failure handling, duplicate sends, client setup requirements, pricing/packaging, compliance/spam laws for Egypt/Arab markets, and more.
